channel.title: Py4_ - A lens into the entropy of being
channel.description: Personal blog about software engineering, life, and deep thoughts. Writing from Tehran to Canada.

item.title: Protein Math and Not Dying
item.description: Personal notes on hitting protein targets, high-efficiency protein sources, cruciferous vegetables, and fiber. Maintenance vs bulk, the 80/20 rule, and broccoli sprouts.

item.title: Browser Sessions Are All-or-Nothing
item.description: Web sessions assume a human is in control. But when AI agents take over your browser, you're either logged in with full permissions or not. We need selective authorization—read-only modes, proof-of-human-intent, and agent-aware backends.
